title: 第 82 節
en: — and Plato speak hesitatingly of a future life, 323.

— as seat of the passions, 189. — - organ of thought, 189.
— the living, 189, — placed in the liver, kidneys, &c., — hardly ever mentioned as seated in the brain, 194.
— called bones and body in the Psalms, 200.
— and dancer, same word in Tamil, — and ghost, 214.
— connected with names for sea, Gothic saiv-s, 215.
— different origin of other names for, 217.
— why the belief in a soul is neces- sary, 229.
— is to man what God is to the universe, 230.
— the, in Man and in Nature, 230.
